title: Another Day, Another Step Towards Our Dream

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during a break in my training session
with <chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Righty-o, time for another day of giv'n my all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is positively brimming with vigor as
usual, I see.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
She mentioned seeing a friend run earlier. It
seems to have lit a fire under her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Motivation comes from all sorts of people,
doesn't it? Whether it be peers, rivals, or people
we admire...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Put another way, it's essential to have someone
like that if we're to keep running toward our
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Seeing someone racing with all their heart ignites
something in us, and makes us want to do better.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, I agree. When I watch Spe run, I feel the
same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, then. Shall we begin our training as well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We ought to step up our game too, lest we get
left behind by Special Week or all the other
racers working towards their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume here all have dreams. Watching
them running towards those lofty goals pushes us
forward and imbues every race with passion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
